interpretation: NO-GO: selected checkpoint did not beat the original natural baseline on all three required held-out Richter metrics; selection remained task-only.

richter_route.fixed_primary: g_total=2.0,r=0.3333333333333333,feedback_som_center_weight=0.10,raw held replay, fixed direct+SOM static routes
richter_route.suppressors_divisive: all explicit predicted suppression and divisive scales set to zero

feedback.v1_error_comparator_description: separate_measurement_only_v1_error_population; fixed_symmetric uses ERR+ sensory_excitation_minus_held_hpred_prediction_inhibition; signed_normalized adds ERR- prediction_excitation_minus_sensory_inhibition using normalized_preprobe_hpred_shape; no_v1_feedback

separate_measurement_only_v1_error_population; fixed_symmetric uses ERR+ sensory_excitation_minus_held_hpred_prediction_inhibition; signed_normalized adds ERR- prediction_excitation_minus_sensory_inhibition using normalized_preprobe_hpred_shape; no_v1_feedback

selection_rule: Select exactly one checkpoint using heldout prediction metrics only. Eligible candidates must have native Stage1 PASS, heldout context persistence in [200,500] ms, and heldout no_runaway_population_rate_hz <= 80. Rank by descending heldout forecast_probability; tie-break by descending v1_template_argmax_matches_expected_channel_fraction, descending v1_template_cosine_mean, ascending heldout no_runaway_population_rate_hz, then predefined seed order [42,43,44,45] and n_trials order [72,144]. If no heldout-eligible candidate exists, select no checkpoint and do not run Richter.
